panels.title: Core Signals — AI Baseline Pack #1 (cpu, memory, api_latency, queue_depth)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "service-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["service_id"] == "${service_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tenant_id"] == "${tenant_id}")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "service_id", "tenant_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "service-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "memory_usage_percent")

  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "service-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "api_latency_ms")

from(bucket: "service-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

panels.title: Secondary Signals — Z-score fallback (chưa có baseline riêng)

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
